business_ideas.idea: Product + Services with offshore teams for high-TAM markets
White-label WordPress development agency model (Seahawk Media)
Bookkeeping and accounting services via offshore teams + reseller model
Portfolio acquisition of QuickBooks/Xero ecosystem apps
Open source CRM to disrupt traditional CRM market
Costco-style software subscription bundle for developers
OSS Capital-style investing in open source projects

predictions.text: Open source will disrupt every established software market in next 10 years
AppFlowy and cal.com will become unicorns disrupting Notion and Calendly
QuickBooks ecosystem apps represent $10M+ acquisition opportunity if 5 apps doing $2-3M each combined
